# Corporate Style — PPT Template Specs

## Font Pairing
- Heading: Arial Black (bold, impactful)
- Body: Arial (clean, readable)
- Data/numbers: Calibri (modern numerals)

## Color Palette (NO # prefix)
- Primary: "1F4E79" (dark blue)
- Accent 1: "E74C3C" (red, for highlights)
- Accent 2: "F39C12" (orange, for callouts)
- Background: "FFFFFF" (white)
- Dark text: "2C3E50"
- Light text: "FFFFFF"
- Subtle: "ECF0F1" (light gray)

## Slide Elements
- Left accent bar: 0.3" wide, primary color, full height
- Section dividers: full-background primary color, white text
- Footer stripe: 0.4" height, "F2F2F2" background
- Page numbers: bottom-right, 10pt, "999999"

## Slide Types
- Title: Large text (36pt), subtitle (18pt), accent bar left
- Section: Full primary background, section name centered (32pt white)
- Content: Title (24pt) + bullets (16pt) + accent shape right side
- Table: Title + table with header row (primary bg, white text)
- Highlight: Large number (72pt, accent1) + description (18pt)
- Closing: "Thank you" + contact info, centered

## Layout Rules
- Max 6 bullets per slide
- Bullet indent: 0.5" per level
- Image area: right 40% of slide (for image+text layouts)
- Margins: 0.8" left, 0.5" right, 0.5" top, 0.8" bottom
